The exam timer will start after login.
You may change answers any time before final submission.
Use the 'Clear' button to remove a selected option.
Do not refresh the page during the exam.
Click Submit button at the end of the exam.
Total duration: 3 Hr.
Each correct answer: +4
Each wrong answer: -1
No negative marks for unattempted questions
Total Questions: 75 Each subject (Physics – 25, Chemistry – 25, Mathematics – 25) 60 MCQ questions (20 in each subject), contains 15 NAT (5 in each subject)
+5 (for each subject) if answered only correct answer in total 15 marks.
+5 if no single wrong answer in the entire question paper.
Total = 20 marks for smart players.
Do not refresh the page during the exam

Instructions for Monthly Test Physics - 02
Enter your NAME in CAPITAL LETTERS and correct Student ID.
The exam timer will start after login.
You may change answers any time before final submission.
Use the 'Clear' button to remove a selected option.
Do not refresh the page during the exam.
Click Submit button at the end of the exam.
Total duration: 60 minutes
SECTION A (Q1 to Q4): Single Correct MCQ - Each question has 4 options (A, B, C, D). Only one correct answer.
SECTION A Marking: +3 correct, 0 unanswered, -1 wrong
SECTION B (Q5 to Q8): Multiple Correct MCQ - One or more options may be correct. Select all correct options.
SECTION B Marking: +4 all correct, +3 special case (3/4 correct when all are correct), +2 partial correct (≥2 correct chosen), +1 single correct, 0 unanswered, -1 wrong combination
SECTION C (Q9 to Q12): Numerical Answer Type - Enter numerical value only. Round/truncate to 2 decimal places if needed.
SECTION C Marking: +4 correct, 0 wrong
SECTION D (Q12 to Q16): Matching Type - Match List-I (P, Q, R, S) with List-II (1, 2, 3, 4, 5). Only one correct combination.
SECTION D Marking: +4 correct, 0 unanswered, -1 wrong
Unic Academy – Clarity • Confidence • Results
